welcome_offer.description: Earn 80,000 Bonus Miles after spending $12,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership.
notes: Official Amex business search result shows current Reserve Business offer: 80,000 Bonus Miles after $12,000/6 months.
Previous 7/15/2026 public limited-time offer was removed from current production values to avoid displaying an expired offer.

welcome_offer: sources/*delta-news*.md:New Delta SkyMiles Reserve American Express Card Members can earn 100,000 bonus miles after spending $6,000... plus an additional 25,000 bonus miles after spending an additional $3,000...

open_questions: Confirm the 7/15/2026 expiry remains visible before applying future changes.

community.summary: Official Delta business and news sources are canonical for this public limited-time offer. Third-party sources are supporting only.

observations.excerpt: Delta business sources describe up to 125,000 miles for Reserve.
USCCG tracks the same elevated Delta Reserve Business offer.
